name: Ferry Building
note: Archive documents linked to this place; source labels honour the SFPL-vs-Democracy's-Library distinction.

documents.title: Ferry Building complex : the Embarcadero, Ferry Building/World Trade Center, Agriculture Building, Pier One : final environmental impact report
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of City Planning
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1983 final EIR on the Ferry Building complex (Embarcadero, World Trade Center, Agriculture Building, Pier One), with floor plans and restoration and design alternatives for the building.

documents.title: The comprehensive plan : northern waterfront
documents.creator: San Francisco (Calif.). Dept. of City Planning
documents.source_label: Internet Archive — San Francisco Public Library partnership scans
documents.gloss: A 1971 northern-waterfront comprehensive plan calling for the Ferry Building to be revived as a gateway and re-established as the focal point of Market Street once the Embarcadero Freeway is removed.
